title: illicium cubense subsp. cubense
intro: Illicium cubense subsp. cubense, also known as Chinese star anise, is a plant species native to southern China, belonging to the Illicium genus and containing the essential oil anethole. The medicinal properties of Illicium cubense subsp. cubense include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include relief from respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Illicium cubense subsp. cubense is commonly used in herbal preparations like teas, capsules, and essential oils, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
